title: podman auto-update not finding the systemd service
body:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

podman auto-update does not work on my RHEL 9 system
when i run: `$ podman auto-update`
i get:
`Error: 1 errors occurred:
	* auto-updating container "20cce516be7e8655853a120f244c4742ff2fd6c228b82899e9683654a5b8f57e": no PODMAN_SYSTEMD_UNIT label found`


**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

```
$  podman run -d --name owncloud.....
$  podman generate systemd owncloud > /home/user/.config/systemd/user/container-owncloud.service
$  podman container stop owncloud
$  systemctl --user daemon-reload
$  systemctl --user start container-owncloud.service
$  podman auto-update 
```
**Describe the results you received:**
```
Error: 1 errors occurred:
	* auto-updating container "20cce516be7e8655853a120f244c4742ff2fd6c228b82899e9683654a5b8f57e": no PODMAN_SYSTEMD_UNIT label found
```

**Describe the results you expected:**

auto-update the container



**Output of `podman version`:**

```
Client:       Podman Engine
Version:      4.2.0
API Version:  4.2.0
Go Version:   go1.18.4
Built:        Wed Oct 26 20:30:14 2022
OS/Arch:      linux/amd64

```

comments.body:
Thank you for reaching out, @big1tasty!

`$  podman generate systemd owncloud > /home/user/.config/systemd/user/container-owncloud.service`

The `--new` flag is missing: Auto updates only work with units generated with `generate systemd --new`.

> Thank you for reaching out, @big1tasty!
> 
> `$ podman generate systemd owncloud > /home/user/.config/systemd/user/container-owncloud.service`
> 
> The `--new` flag is missing: Auto updates only work with units generated with `generate systemd --new`.

Thank you very much!
